# Spessirits Pilates

> Physio-led Pilates studio in Schilde, Belgium

## About
Spessirits Pilates is a boutique Pilates studio run by Cintia, a licensed physiotherapist (kinesitherapist) with over 20 years of clinical experience. Every session is grounded in physiotherapy principles, offering safe, effective movement coaching tailored to each client's body and goals.

## Location
Cirkellaan 12, 2970 Schilde, Belgium
Coordinates: 51.2456°N, 4.5147°E

## Services
- Individual Pilates sessions (1-on-1 with Cintia)
- Duo Pilates sessions (2 people)
- Physiotherapy-based movement assessment and coaching

## Session Details
- All sessions are by appointment only
- Sessions are guided by a licensed physiotherapist
- Suitable for all levels, including rehabilitation and injury prevention

## Contact
- Phone: +32 472 24 05 81
- Email: spessiritskine@icloud.com
- WhatsApp: +32 472 91 39 17
- Website: https://calm-balance-flow.lovable.app

## Languages
Dutch (Nederlands), English, French (Français), Portuguese (Português)

## Opening Hours
Monday – Friday: 08:00 – 19:00

## Pricing
Pricing on application — every programme is personal. Contact the studio for a tailored quote.

## Booking
Book online at https://calm-balance-flow.lovable.app/boeken or contact via phone/WhatsApp.
